/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/client_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/client/net.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/shared/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/shared/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/client.dir/src/shared/game_state.cpp.o -o bin/client
